user_system_path: Master Audit #445 — gem-surfacing, slice 3: high-consequence overdue-admission window. The scorer drops commitments overdue by >30 days before scoring (lib/briefing/scorer.ts stale_overdue_commitment_filtered). That blanket cutoff silently drops a real overdue money/legal/work gem — the job-offer response that lapsed ~5 weeks ago died there even after the stakes-floor fix (#456). Fix: overdueAdmissionWindowDays widens the window to 60 days for high-consequence rows (risk_score >= 60); low/moderate-risk keep 30. Fail-safe: only widens ADMISSION — the scorer's soft staleness/timing penalty (commitment-risk timingScore) still discounts the very stale at ranking, so a truly dead low-value row cannot win. Continues PR #456 (stakes floor) + PR #457 (lapsing-card SYNC: hygiene). Constraint: NO paid API calls.
allowed_files_raw: Overdue-window scorer change (lib/briefing/scorer.ts) + unit test + control-plane. NOTE: this commit also merges Pass 4's already-merged files (morning-pipeline orchestrator + generator docstring + api-tracker test + LESSONS_LEARNED) from main — a parallel-agent collision resolution — so those are allow-listed for the merge. No schema, no deps.
required_local_proof: npm run gate:continuity && npx vitest run lib/briefing && npm run typecheck
required_browser_proof: N/A — deterministic backend scoring change, exercised by unit + suite tests, not browser-observable.
acceptance_condition: Follow-on gem admission: overdueAdmissionWindowDays (lib/briefing/scorer.ts) widens the stale-overdue commitment cutoff from a 30-day blanket to 60 days for high-consequence rows (risk_score >= 60), so a real overdue money/legal/work gem (e.g. the job-offer response that lapsed ~5 weeks ago) survives to scoring; low/moderate-risk keep 30 days and the soft staleness penalty still discounts the very stale at ranking. Unit tests green; full lib/briefing suite + typecheck green; gate:continuity passes; #445 updated. (Prior slices: highConsequenceStakesFloor PR #456, lapsing-card SYNC: hygiene PR #457.)
anti_regression_checks: full lib/briefing suite green + typecheck clean; change is additive (no logic deleted)
floor is lift-only and inert for signals/relationships and for fixtures without risk_score (no regression)
noise stays suppressed — transactional/junk commitments are still excluded at pool admission, untouched by this change
stop_condition: Stop when the stakes-floor is up as a PR with proof; owner validates one generation cycle surfaces a real gem instead of 'nothing cleared the bar'.
next_command: Owner: run one generation cycle and confirm a real gem clears the bar. Next seams (not done): extend the >30d-overdue admission window for high-consequence categories (so a stale-but-critical legal/work gem isn't dropped at line ~5077); the two-way test for relationship gems; merge DRAFT PR #454 (broadcast-sender suppression) after its paid validation.
